A.evidence: Clean prose and correct GFM Table 1, but every display equation is rendered as '<!-- formula-not-decoded -->' (Attention, MultiHead, FFN, PE all lost) and Figure box labels dumped as loose lines; author order slightly scrambled (Llion/Niki swapped).

B.evidence: Correct author order, faithful prose, Table 1 as aligned GFM, and all display equations rendered as usable LaTeX; only the W_i^Q/W_i^K projection-matrix line has garbled inline superscript markup.

C.evidence: Cleanest prose with correct author order and conference footnote, full LaTeX for all equations and aligned Table 1; omits only the top red attribution banner and the (2) number on the FFN equation.

D.evidence: Display equations preserved as LaTeX, but inline text is riddled with literal $\_{t}$/$\_{model}$ subscript escapes, has a 'sequenceligned' typo, fragments the author block, and inserts 'Flow chart' placeholder junk for Figure 2.
